/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR MODIFICATION OF RELEASE TERMS/MO GRTD/EMMOD: HOMEDETENTION TERMINATED, DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON GPS,/CTORD: COMPLY WITH PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER/WS/WEAP/X: THE 06-21-22 PRELIMINARY HEARINGIS CONFIRMED,/LDPX: 06-28-22 (60)/

/CAL: BAIL REVIEW HEARING/CTORD: BAIL REVIEW MOTION IS DENIED/WS/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING (HOME DETENTION) BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISED OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION)UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES: WORK SCHEDULE APPROVED BY SFSO/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: 05-12-22 IS CONFIRMED FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL AND ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS  SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,//NTW/LDPX:05-13-22 (10) 06-28-22 (60)/CTORD: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/BAIL: 100000/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE *HOME DETENTION* UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/WEAP/WS/SAORD/SA1: CHRISLETTE PITTEARD, 33 YEAR OLD FEMALE/SA2:SHACK RESTAURANT, 5150 3RD STREET, SANFRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/CTORD: THE PROTECTED PERSON MAY RECORD ANY PROHIBITEDCOMMUNICATIONS MADE BY THE RESTRAINED PERSON/CONTD: BAIL REVIEW HEARING/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING IS GRANTED,/CAUSE/NTW60/LDPX: 06-28-22/CONT/DOP/
